title: Methods of Mathematical Physics (3MP)
outline: Topics include: the Fourier-transform solution of linear PDEs on the line; long-term asymptotic behaviour of solutions via the methods of Laplace, stationary phase and steepest descents; nonlinear waves including the method of characteristics, the effect of dissipation, the Cole-Hopf transform for the Burgers equation and travelling fronts for the KPP equation; the effect of dispersion including KdV and nonlinear Schrödinger equation; elliptic integrals and elliptic functions; dark and bright solitons; kinks and breathers for the sine-Gordon equation; multisoliton solutions via the Hirota method and Bäcklund transformations.
dp_requirements: A class record of 30% or more.
assessment: Class record counts up to 50%; the balance is given by the final examination.
